summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the new E-commerce Invoice Creator feature on the Products tab of Patient Detail page. All 14 test cases passed. The feature is fully functional with proper data-testid attributes, live total calculation, confirmation dialog, and proper reset behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented as specified in the requirements
Invoice total calculation updates live as user types prices
Remove button correctly disabled when only one row exists
Confirmation dialog shows product summary with total before confirming
Cancel in dialog closes without resetting items (correct behavior)
I Confirm resets items and shows success toast (correct behavior)
Products tab correctly disabled for do_not_contact patients
Suggested Products section still renders below the new invoice section (regression passed)
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used existing patient Rajesh Kumar (ID: 2a382fa8-a130-4074-a2db-23afb5052029) for invoice testing. Temporarily set Sunil Verma (ID: 29e0d92c-cbe7-4ae0-9885-1543cebb8361) to do_not_contact for regression testing, then reset to open.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-commerce Invoice Creator feature is complete and working. All data-testid attributes match the specification. The feature is frontend-only (no backend API calls). The 'I Confirm' action is a no-op placeholder per product spec - it shows a success toast and resets the form but doesn't persist data.

invoice_section.custom-invoice-section visible: PASS - Section appears on Products tab
invoice_section.invoice-total-amount live update: PASS - Total updates as user types prices
invoice_section.invoice-item-remove-{idx} disabled when: PASS - Remove button disabled with single row
invoice_section.invoice-item-remove-{idx} enabled with m: PASS - Remove button enabled with 2+ rows
invoice_section.invoice-generate-btn with no valid items: PASS - Error toast shown, dialog NOT opened
invoice_section.invoice-confirm-dialog shows product sum: PASS - Dialog shows products and total
invoice_section.invoice-confirm-btn shows success toast: PASS - Success toast shown, form reset

regression_tests.Products tab disabled for do_not_contact: PASS - Tab disabled with Ban icon

mocked_apis_note: This feature is FRONTEND-ONLY. No backend API calls are made. The 'I Confirm' action is a placeholder per product spec.
